---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Hastia Additions
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Mysti33

---

**Describe the feature**
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement.

**Benefits / Use Cases**
Explain why this feature would be useful for players or enhance gameplay.

**Additional context**
Provide any examples, references, or screenshots if applicable.
